author: doll-agent
content: Implement WritebackGuard<'a, T, D> as a Drop-based scope guard in new ferray-core/src/writeback.rs. Pattern: new(target) clones target into a contiguous scratch, scratch_mut() exposes mutable access for kernels, commit() writes back element-by-element via iter_mut (works for any target layout), discard()/drop without commit leaves target untouched. Element-by-element copy in logical order handles non-contig targets (Fortran-order, sliced views) automatically. 6 tests covering commit, discard, panic-safety drop, 2D contiguous, scratch initialization, and Fortran-order target.
